channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
item.description: The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year. To try and stave off its demise, NASA has enlisted Katalyst Space Technologies. The company's Link spacecraft launched Friday with the goal of intercepting […]

item.title: How America's 250th birthday became a test of AI-powered collective intelligence
item.description: Imagine if you could bring 250 people together in a massive room and have them discuss and debate an important issue, arguing the points and counterpoints, and converging on answers that accurately reflect their collective knowledge, wisdom, values, and sensibilities.Now imagine that you convened this debate on America’s 250th birthday and asked 250 randomly selected Americans to come up with the top three innovations that America has contributed to the world over the last 250 years. What would they come up with?I know – this all sounds impossible. After all, you can’t get more than a dozen pe...

item.title: Even after more than a decade Arkham Knight is a near-perfect Batman game — but its Riddler challenges still have an unmatched power to annoy
item.description: Batman: Arkham Knight is a genuinely fantastic game that hates its players' time.

item.title: How your smartwatch and AI might detect early signs of illness
item.description: Wearables are best at noticing breaks from your body's usual patterns. Those outliers can hint that something warrants further investigation with your doctor.

item.title: How to watch Paraguay vs France: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Kylian Mbappe's FIFA World Cup 2026 favourites eye last-16 win
item.description: Here's how to watch Paraguay vs France for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Les Bleus aim to book their place in the last eight.

item.title: 'Advances in quantum research and development have shifted the risk horizon': Microsoft says it is ramping up its quantum computing security work
item.description: Microsoft plans a broad post-quantum migration by 2029 as concerns over future decryption risks increase globally.

item.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
item.description: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

item.title: I test 4K Blu-ray for a living and these are the 4 discs I'm most looking forward to testing in July 2026
item.description: July 2026 is packed with tons of new 4K Blu-ray releases: here are the top 4 I'm looking forward to testing.

item.title: Tesla expands robotaxi service to small section of Miami
item.description: The company's robotaxi roadmap mentions future expansions to Orlando and Tampa.

item.title: Amazon brade à moitié prix cette sonnette connectée 3K avec carillon pour sécuriser votre entrée
item.description: Sécuriser l'entrée de sa maison sans se ruiner devient très abordable grâce à cette offre sur la sonnette connectée Ezviz CP8. Accompagné de son carillon, ce modèle capable de filmer en résolution 3K tombe à 69 euros au lieu de 129 euros sur Amazon.
